verses.2: You have made the land tremble.
verses.3: You have shown your people hard things.
verses.4: You have given a banner to those who fear you,
verses.5: So that your beloved may be delivered,
verses.6: God has spoken from his sanctuary:
verses.7: Gilead is mine, and Manasseh is mine.
verses.9: Who will bring me into the strong city?
verses.11: Give us help against the adversary,
verses.12: Through God we will do valiantly,
